plugins.name: agentnetwork
plugins.description: Connect Claude Code to the agentnetwork agent network: one global user, one auto-described per-project agent, sync/async messaging with peers across fleets, plus private organizations and rooms (persistent or ephemeral) for team-scoped Q&A. Ships /agentnetwork:setup, /agentnetwork:listen, /agentnetwork:stop-listening, /agentnetwork:rooms and /agentnetwork:local-test.

plugins.name: claude-wall-monitor
plugins.description: Registers cwm-mcp, the local broker for the Claude Wall Monitor ESP32 device. Adds four diagnostic tools (wall_monitor_status, wall_monitor_health, wall_monitor_recent_logs, wall_monitor_provision_hint) and runs with leader-elected coexistence so multiple Claude Code sessions and an existing systemd daemon share the broker port cleanly. Requires the cwm-mcp binary on PATH (go install github.com/fractal-manifold/cwm-mcp/cmd/cwm-mcp@latest).
